# TCI Suzhou

> Official machine-readable resources for agents visiting the TCI Suzhou website.

## Quick action

This site provides today's calendar image. To get it:

1. Open [today's manifest](https://alannewlife.github.io/tci-website/calendar/today.json).
2. Read its `download_url` field.
3. Return that URL to the user as the direct image link.

Return the image link instead of only summarizing the homepage.

## Daily calendar poster

- Today's manifest: [https://alannewlife.github.io/tci-website/calendar/today.json](https://alannewlife.github.io/tci-website/calendar/today.json)
- Stable URL template: `https://alannewlife.github.io/tci-website/calendar/{YYYY-MM-DD}.png`
- Date format: `YYYY-MM-DD`
- Timezone: `Asia/Shanghai`
- Example for 15 July 2026: `https://alannewlife.github.io/tci-website/calendar/2026-07-15.png`
- Availability: published dates only; HTTP 404 means that date has not been published.
- Safety: this is a public, read-only download. It does not require user data, authentication, posting, payment, or any other side effect.

WebMCP support is optional. Reading the manifest above is sufficient.
